metadata.title: Database for Predicting Oxidation Resistance of Refractory High-Entropy Alloys
metadata.description: This dataset contains experimental data on the oxidation behavior of conventional refractory alloys, Refractory High-Entropy Alloys (RHEAs), and Refractory Complex Concentrated Alloys (RCCAs). The dataset is limited to isothermal oxidation experiments conducted in air and is used to train and validate AI models for predicting net specific mass change during oxidation.
metadata.scope: Only isothermal oxidation data measured in air are included. Non-isothermal oxidation tests, cyclic oxidation tests, and oxidation experiments conducted under atmospheres other than air were excluded to maintain consistency across the compiled records.
metadata.source: The dataset includes data extracted from published literature and initial experimental data generated by the authors' laboratory. DOI links in the source column indicate data collected from published literature, whereas 'Tom_ini' denotes initial experimental data generated by the authors' laboratory.

columns.name: Alloy_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier assigned to each nominal alloy composition within the dataset. The same Alloy_ID is used for the same nominal composition, even when data are collected from different literature sources or tested under different oxidation conditions.

columns.name: Source_Alloy_ID
columns.description: Identifier assigned to distinguish alloy records according to their source. This field helps track cases where the same nominal alloy composition appears in different literature sources or experimental datasets.

columns.name: alloy_formula
columns.description: Chemical formula or alloy name reported in the original publication or experimental source. This field is retained for traceability and is not used as a unique identifier.

columns.name: Al
columns.description: Atomic percent of aluminum (Al) in the alloy.

columns.name: Cr
columns.description: Atomic percent of chromium (Cr) in the alloy.

columns.name: Hf
columns.description: Atomic percent of hafnium (Hf) in the alloy.

columns.name: Mo
columns.description: Atomic percent of molybdenum (Mo) in the alloy.

columns.name: Nb
columns.description: Atomic percent of niobium (Nb) in the alloy.

columns.name: Si
columns.description: Atomic percent of silicon (Si) in the alloy.

columns.name: Ta
columns.description: Atomic percent of tantalum (Ta) in the alloy.

columns.name: Ti
columns.description: Atomic percent of titanium (Ti) in the alloy.

columns.name: V
columns.description: Atomic percent of vanadium (V) in the alloy.

columns.name: W
columns.description: Atomic percent of tungsten (W) in the alloy.

columns.name: Zr
columns.description: Atomic percent of zirconium (Zr) in the alloy.

columns.name: temperature
columns.description: Isothermal oxidation test temperature in degree Celsius (°C).

columns.name: specific_mass_change
columns.description: Net specific mass change measured after oxidation exposure, expressed in mg/cm². This value represents the balance between oxidation-induced mass gain and possible mass loss due to volatilization or scale spallation, rather than a direct measurement of oxide-scale growth.

columns.name: source
columns.description: Data source for each oxidation record. 'Tom_ini' denotes initial experimental data from the authors' laboratory, whereas DOI links indicate data collected from published literature.

metadata.citation: S. Gorsse et al., 'Advancing Refractory High Entropy Alloy Development with AI-Predictive Models for High Temperature Oxidation Resistance,' Scripta Materialia, vol. 255, 2025.
